ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "accX" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accY" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accZ" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "gyroX" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyroY" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyroZ" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the data was collected */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the sensor data */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device during data collection */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the device during data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity during which the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, wearable, IoT device) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the device */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the device */,
  "battery_status" TEXT /* Current battery status (e.g., charging, discharging) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data sync */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES device_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed during the session */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type used in the session */,
  "device_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model used in the session */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors used in the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_model_id") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., physical, sedentary) */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "sensor_capabilities" TEXT /* Types of sensors supported by the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the device */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the device was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device model */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Expected battery life of the device */,
  "supported_sensors" TEXT /* Types of sensors supported by the device model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the data file (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data record the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data record the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
